description: Cross-project SOTA discovery topics. Consumed by discovery.mjs phase-1 fan-out.

topics.notes: What MCPs are missing from ~/.claude/mcp/ runtime? Covers all 9 categories of MCP utility.
Plan-by-files pattern: agents write plans into separate files for coordination. Also: ReAct, handoffs, swarm.
Deep-research agent market (gpt-researcher, dzhng/deep-research, DeepResearchAgent, etc.). Focus: novelty + adoption.
Skill packs beyond ECC, ruflo, context-mode, claude-hud. Awesome-list sources: addyosmani/agent-skills, vercel-labs/agent-skills, ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills.
Hook-based automation (PreToolUse, PreCompact, etc.). Safety + enforcement frameworks.

Code intelligence tier (Ry Walker taxonomy): knowledge graphs (gitnexus, code-graph-context), code search (octocode, codepathfinder), context packing (repomix, code2prompt), platforms (deepwiki, greptile).
Quantitative trading + RL-trained agents. Owner: trading-system project. Covers neural-trader, market-data, ruvector, agentdb, RL frameworks.
Prompt compression, token optimization, prompt caching patterns, LLM eval frameworks. Canonical repos: prompt-crafter, token-lens, prompt-optimizer.
